title: The Factory Fight Continues
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the factory fight continues, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Franky, Unknown person #6 as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Buhaa!! My stomach hurts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Owah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I missed again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You sure are quick, aren't ya!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Donguixote family (diamante army officer): Mach Vise.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Shut it!! Super what are you supposed to be!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You float up and then embed yourself in the ground!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's as far as you go!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Strawhat Crew Member, CyBorg Franky!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The toy house is Sur- Rounded...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: ...by the marines, on all sides!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Huh!? Why're the Marines here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What the!? I didn't hear about this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Just more noise...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines are on the move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thanks for being so decisive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "FUji- Tora".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: hall of suits.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Do not mistake me for an ally of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Beyond just the "Strawhat crew" ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Given that other suspi- circus indivi- duals have begun to move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: My actions are only natural.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The military should always fight so as to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...Minimize the damage done to the populace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: IF STRAW- HAT'S GOAL IS TO TAKE YOUR LIFE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Then he won't hesitate to cause massive destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: So stopping that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: is my "justice".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: As for you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: That will come later....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What are you saying...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I may be a recent recruit through the world con- scription...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: but given my position as "Admiral"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: There is something I want to accom- plish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: That is, the complete abolition...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: of the institution of "Royal Shichibu- Kai"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: There was a country where pirates threat- lined to hijack the Royal throne...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: had the attempt sub-ceed, it would have become as vile a land as this one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: What happens to the balance between the three powers?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Well, we won't know until we smash it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: So know this- as your sins continue to amass...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: So does the price on your head increase, master tenyasha.

summary: The Factory Fight Continues focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Franky as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.
